hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("git push")' >/dev/null || exit 0; [ "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current)" = "master" ] && exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A git push just ran on a non-master branch. Before ending the turn, check whether this branch has an open PR (gh pr view) and whether the push made the PR description stale (content, scope, commit list); if so, update it with gh pr edit."}}'
